note: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 from both WebFetch and curl (x-deny-reason: host_not_allowed) — consistent with prior days; agent-environment network proxy blocks outbound HTTP. SSL handshakes via openssl s_client succeeded for all 8 domains, confirming servers are live. SSL WARNING: certs now show notAfter=Jun 9 2026 (29 days remaining, below 30-day threshold). Yesterday showed Jun 8; today Jun 9 — one-day forward creep continues, Vercel Let's Encrypt auto-renewal still pending. Expect a larger jump to ~90-day expiry once renewal completes. SSL warning is genuine; monitor daily until renewal resolves.
